examples: I didn't quite catch his surname—was it Morn-M-O-R-N?
Days are spent in play and enjoyment from morn till night.
There we can enjoy ourselves and be happy from morn till night.
Holland tumbled as Misty Morn left the stalls in the Hilary Needler Trophy and was taken to hospital for X-rays.
Morningstar (nasdaq: MORN - news - people ) now tracks 224 ETFs, some 99 of them based in the United States.
